crime.value: Disappearance of a bride during her wedding reception in 1800s
crime.quote: sometime that late afternoon or evening Partheana disappeared.

victim.value: Partheana, a bride who disappeared on her wedding day, wealthy family connection made her notable
victim.quote: Benjamin White and the White family were the riches people on the island

closed_world.value: Island location (Nautilus Beach) with limited access points, wedding reception at mansion
closed_world.quote: Benjamin White and the White family were the riches people on the island

resolution.value: Police investigation concludes successfully, expenses presented to TV host who issued challenge
resolution.quote: And by the way here is a list of the expenses occurred for the investigation

investigator.value: Police Captain Robert Wallace, official detective with institutional authority
investigator.quote: The Police Captain was there to answer any questions that Monahan might have trouble with

red_herring.value: Multiple false theories about Partheana's disappearance - drowning, abduction, running away - systematically eliminated to misdirect from true solution
red_herring.quote: That leaves abduction and run away as two choices. If Partheana was abducted no one produced a ransom note.

clue_fairness.value: Physical evidence and logical deduction shared with reader - location of privies, lighting conditions, sound of orchestra all presented as accessible clues
clue_fairness.quote: The light from the candles or oil lamps would have been visible as it shined through the window glass.

social_world.value: Wealth-based hierarchy on island - Benjamin White and White family as richest residents, Doctor Baker also wealthy, creating social stratification
social_world.quote: Benjamin White and the White family were the riches people on the island. Doctor Phineas Baker was wealthy

media_and_audience.value: Television challenge format creates public spectacle of cold case investigation, with reporter Morton presenting historical mystery as entertainment
media_and_audience.quote: He sat on a hard, wooden chair under hot glowing lights. He didn't want to be in the television studio

investigator_wound.value: Detective Wallace's general distrust and aversion to media despite being married to a reporter, creating internal conflict about public exposure
investigator_wound.quote: he had an aversion to newspaper, radio and television reporters, even though he was married to one.

_meta.title: ebook robert f clifton the case of the missing bride
